text.title: Platform Team Charter Template Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply platform-team-charter-template. Each step names its input, action, and output. Steps may not be reordered without explicit deviation note.

step.name: Identify customers
step.description: Input: Stakeholder map. Action: Name primary + secondary customers.. Output: Customer list..

step.name: Define scope + anti-scope
step.description: Input: Customer list. Action: Enumerate work in/out.. Output: Scope + anti-scope..

step.name: Catalogue services + SLAs
step.description: Input: Existing inventory + scope. Action: Paved-road service list with SLAs.. Output: Service catalogue..
step.note: Step 3. Required input: Existing inventory + scope.

step.name: Support model
step.description: Input: Scope + customer list. Action: Tiered support — docs → office hours → on-call.. Output: Support model..
step.note: Step 4. Required input: Scope + customer list.

step.name: Pick metrics
step.description: Input: All above. Action: 3-5 platform-health metrics + dashboard.. Output: Metric set..

step.name: Sign + publish
step.description: Input: Charter draft. Action: Owner signs; publish to engineering wiki.. Output: Live charter..
